modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to disable screen lock on USD owned computers

full_description_text:
- The user is seeking assistance to disable the lock screen feature on their computer.  
- They are currently working on an experiment and require the device to remain unlocked during this time.  
- The request pertains to computers operating on Windows 10 and Windows 7 within a domain environment.
